problem id: 89dfa4c2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  01001010 -> 00101001
  01110000 -> 11000001
  01101001 -> 10100101
  00001010 -> 00101000
  00101010 -> 00101000
  10100000 -> 10000010
  01100001 -> 10000101
  01111101 -> 10110101
  00000111 -> 00011100
  10011010 -> 01101010

query: 10101110
predicted answer: 00111010
